Reference

Blazing

T Latin

"Blazing torches hang from the gold-paneled ceiling,
and torches conquer the night with flames" (NA)

reference topics

back to "Flung their smoke ..." noteFlung their smokeFlung their smoke ... Laquearia. V. Aeneid , I, 726: dependent lychni laqueribus auries incensi, et noctem flammis funalia vincunt [Eliot's note] Eliot refers to lines from a passage which describe how Dido entertains her royal guests (Aeneas and train).
